{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201646273A79A42115674B0521F0"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7374115742062887731","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书的写作风格很独特，像在和你聊天一样，用轻松有趣的方式讲述历史故事。作者通过对人物、情节和背景的巧妙结合，让历史变得生动鲜活。让我想到了《明朝那些事儿》，同样是以幽默风趣的方式讲述历史，让人在阅读中轻松掌握历史知识。而且这本书的文笔简洁流畅，很容易让人沉浸其中","text_exts":[{"e":77,"s":71,"text":"明朝那些事儿","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%98%8E%E6%9C%9D%E9%82%A3%E4%BA%9B%E4%BA%8B%E5%84%BF&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317739963874B0521F0%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227374115742062887731%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227255618646611856420%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%98%8E%E6%9C%9D%E9%82%A3%E4%BA%9B%E4%BA%8B%E5%84%BF%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1715111865,"group_id":"7255618646611856420","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7gbOB6Fz5NDbJQQYfCEzlXwIpEJ8pQFp5RqwKW2sASD","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3776195865087129","user_name":"爱吃香菇猪脚的慕容严"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3776195865087129","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255618646611856420","book_info":{"abstract":"历史的英文是“history”，拆分开来看就是“Hi，Story”。用故事解说历史，一览5000年中华文明的喜怒与哀乐。
如何讲好故事？如何再现历史？
★ 人物 —— 找到那些凭借一己之力震撼后世的人物，作为主角，我们之所以能被历史打动，首先是被他们打动；
★ 情节 —— 挖掘各个人物背后的重大历史事件，从而梳理出中华几千年的文明坐标和历史走向；
★ 背景 —— 历史中不存在偶然，每个人物、每次事件的出现，都是时代变迁的必然，从背景出发，深刻感受历史的内在关联。
而当你沉浸在其中不能自拔时，你早已轻松把握历史大格局。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/cf7e12aee90e0355d9f07f87a950fc79~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"讲历史的王老师","author_id":"","book_id":"7255618646611856420","book_name":"历史这么有意思","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#a84030","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3.8万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":241,"name":"历史文化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=241&name=历史文化&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476024854378990654","read_count":"671","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"129384"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"67","tags":"历史,历史文化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/cf7e12aee90e0355d9f07f87a950fc79~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779180387&x-signature=kq2L9IBmsI1sWviOvQr%2BsksIKWI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201646273A79A42115674B0521F0"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读46分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2760,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":590},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7421872349498065726","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很有意思的一本书，印象最深刻的地方竟然是不同学派对学生不写作业的看法[偷笑]不过整体通俗易懂，难得让我静下心来完整看下来的一本书[赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728043527,"group_id":"7255618646611856420","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_i
